channel.title: Munich December on Share Hub
channel.description: Recent content in Munich December on Share Hub

item.title: Christmas and New Year in Germany | Munich Christmas Markets & Silvester (2025)
item.description: Christmas in Germany is very different from what you might expect. Weihnachten is quiet and family-focused; Silvester is surprisingly loud. From Munich’s Christmas markets to last year’s Silvester experience — German winter culture through expat eyes.
